title: Zebkit zbk-brand Token Overrides
description: Authorable overrides for the zbk-brand token module.

a11y.description: Runtime accessibility-modifier opt-in: true uses the default modifier for the token type; a string names a custom modifier variable.

scale.description: Fluid-scale controls for this module (e.g. min-viewport/max-viewport/min-base/max-base/min-ratio/max-ratio on font-size, max-scale on spacing).

subtle.description: Subtle brand canvas color for the least-prominent, lightly tinted surfaces.

muted.description: Muted brand canvas color for low-emphasis, recessed surfaces.

emphasis.description: Emphasis brand canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

anyOf.description: Base inverse brand canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse brand canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

muted.description: Muted inverse brand canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

subtle.description: Subtle brand ink color for the least-prominent, tertiary text and icons.

muted.description: Muted brand ink color for secondary text and icons.

emphasis.description: Emphasis brand ink color for high-prominence text and icons.

anyOf.description: Base inverse brand ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse brand ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

muted.description: Muted inverse brand ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

subtle.description: Subtle brand border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

muted.description: Muted brand border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

emphasis.description: Emphasis brand border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

anyOf.description: Base inverse brand border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse brand border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.

subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

muted.description: Muted inverse brand border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.

anyOf.description: Base brand canvas color for primary branded surfaces.

canvas-subtle.description: Subtle brand canvas color for the least-prominent, lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.description: Muted brand canvas color for low-emphasis, recessed surfaces.

canvas-emphasis.description: Emphasis brand canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

anyOf.description: Base inverse brand canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse brand canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

anyOf.description: Base brand ink color (the brand hue) for body text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-subtle.description: Subtle brand ink color for the least-prominent, tertiary text and icons.

ink-muted.description: Muted brand ink color for secondary text and icons.

ink-emphasis.description: Emphasis brand ink color for high-prominence text and icons.

anyOf.description: Base inverse brand ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse brand ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.

anyOf.description: Base brand border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.description: Subtle brand border color for the least-prominent outlines and dividers.

border-muted.description: Muted brand border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.description: Emphasis brand border color for high-prominence outlines and dividers.

anyOf.description: Base inverse brand border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.description: Subtle inverse brand border color for the least-prominent outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.description: Muted inverse brand border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.description: Emphasis inverse brand border color for high-prominence outlines on inverse canvases.
